prompt:
Ultra-detailed surreal conceptual illustration of an man with sitting sadly on top of his own giant detached head lying on the ground. The smaller version of the man sits curled up with knees hugged close, head bowed in deep thought and emotional exhaustion. He wears an oversized white t-shirt, beige shorts, white socks, and vintage Nike sneakers. The giant realistic head beneath him has closed eyes, soft skin texture, detailed wrinkles, and a peaceful yet melancholic expression. The artwork symbolizes overthinking, depression, inner conflict, loneliness, and mental burden. Minimalist cream-white background with delicate hand-drawn technical sketches, abstract symbols, flowing smoke-like lines, geometric annotations, and surreal diagram elements surrounding the figure. Soft earthy tones, pencil sketch outlines mixed with watercolor shading, clean negative space, emotional storytelling composition, editorial art style, highly detailed facial features, dreamy atmosphere, modern conceptual illustration, Behance-style artwork, psychological surrealism, ultra-realistic mixed with sketch aesthetics.

Style keywords: surrealism, conceptual art, emotional illustration, watercolor sketch, ink drawing, minimalist background, psychological art, modern editorial illustration, muted tones, cinematic lighting, fine line art, symbolic composition, high detail, soft shadows, contemporary surreal design.
